# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: User File Uploader
Description: Allows users to upload profile pictures and documents, saving them to wp-content/uploads/user-files/.
Version: 1.0
Author: Your Name
*/

// Define constants for better maintainability
define('UFU_PLUGIN_BASENAME', plugin_basename(__FILE__));
define('UFU_UPLOAD_DIR_NAME', 'user-files');

/**
 * Enqueue scripts and styles for the frontend.
 */
function ufu_enqueue_scripts() {
    if (is_user_logged_in() && !is_admin()) {
        wp_enqueue_style('ufu-style', plugins_url('css/style.css', __FILE__)); // Assuming you might have a style.css
        wp_enqueue_script('ufu-script', plugins_url('js/script.js', __FILE__), array('jquery'), null, true); // Assuming you might have a script.js
        wp_localize_script('ufu-script', 'ufu_ajax_object', array(
            'ajax_url' => admin_url('admin-ajax.php'),
            'security' => wp_create_nonce('ufu_upload_file_nonce')
        ));
    }
}
add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', 'ufu_enqueue_scripts');

/**
 * Create the custom upload directory if it doesn't exist.
 */
function ufu_create_upload_directory() {
    $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
    $ufu_dir = $upload_dir['basedir'] . '/' . UFU_UPLOAD_DIR_NAME;

    if (!file_exists($ufu_dir)) {
        wp_mkdir_p($ufu_dir);
    }

    // Add an index.php to prevent directory listing
    if (!file_exists($ufu_dir . '/index.php')) {
        @file_put_contents($ufu_dir . '/index.php', '<?php // Silence is golden.');
    }
}
register_activation_hook(__FILE__, 'ufu_create_upload_directory');

/**
 * Shortcode to display the file upload form.
 * Usage: [user_file_uploader]
 */
function ufu_file_upload_shortcode() {
    if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
        return '<p>Please log in to upload files.</p>';
    }

    $current_user = wp_get_current_user();
    $user_id = $current_user->ID;

    ob_start();
    ?>
    <div id="ufu-upload-form-wrapper">
        <h3>Upload Your Files</h3>
        <form id="ufu-upload-form" method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data">
            <input type="hidden" name="action" value="ufu_upload_file_action">
            <?php wp_nonce_field('ufu_upload_file_nonce', 'ufu_file_upload_nonce_field'); ?>
            <p>
                <label for="ufu_file_type">File Type:</label>
                <select name="ufu_file_type" id="ufu_file_type">
                    <option value="profile_picture">Profile Picture</option>
                    <option value="document">Document</option>
                    <option value="other">Other</option>
                </select>
            </p>
            <p>
                <label for="ufu_file_description">Description (optional):</label>
                <input type="text" name="ufu_file_description" id="ufu_file_description" placeholder="e.g., Passport, Resume">
            </p>
            <p>
                <label for="ufu_file_input">Choose File:</label>
                <input type="file" name="ufu_file_input" id="ufu_file_input" required>
            </p>
            <p>
                <input type="submit" value="Upload File">
            </p>
            <div id="ufu-upload-message"></div>
        </form>

        <h4>Your Uploaded Files:</h4>
        <div id="ufu-user-files-list">
            <?php echo ufu_display_user_files($user_id); ?>
        </div>
    </div>
    <?php
    return ob_get_clean();
}
add_shortcode('user_file_uploader', 'ufu_file_upload_shortcode');

/**
 * Handles the file upload via AJAX.
 */
function ufu_handle_file_upload() {
    if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
        wp_send_json_error('You must be logged in to upload files.');
    }

    if (!isset($_POST['ufu_file_upload_nonce_field']) || !wp_verify_nonce($_POST['ufu_file_upload_nonce_field'], 'ufu_upload_file_nonce')) {
        wp_send_json_error('Security check failed. Please refresh the page and try again.');
    }

    if (empty($_FILES['ufu_file_input'])) {
        wp_send_json_error('No file was uploaded or an error occurred.');
    }

    $current_user = wp_get_current_user();
    $user_id = $current_user->ID;
    $upload_dir_info = wp_upload_dir();
    $ufu_user_dir = $upload_dir_info['basedir'] . '/' . UFU_UPLOAD_DIR_NAME . '/' . $user_id;

    // Create user-specific subdirectory if it doesn't exist
    if (!file_exists($ufu_user_dir)) {
        wp_mkdir_p($ufu_user_dir);
    }

    $file = $_FILES['ufu_file_input'];
    $file_name = sanitize_file_name($file['name']);
    $file_tmp_name = $file['tmp_name'];
    $file_error = $file['error'];
    $file_size = $file['size'];
    $file_type = wp_check_filetype($file_name);

    if ($file_error !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
        wp_send_json_error('File upload error: ' . $file_error);
    }

    // Define allowed MIME types and max file size
    $allowed_types = array(
        'jpg|jpeg|jpe' => 'image/jpeg',
        'gif' => 'image/gif',
        'png' => 'image/png',
        'bmp' => 'image/bmp',
        'tif|tiff' => 'image/tiff',
        'pdf' => 'application/pdf',
        'doc' => 'application/msword',
        'docx' => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document',
        'xls' => 'application/vnd.ms-excel',
        'xlsx' => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet',
        'ppt' => 'application/vnd.ms-powerpoint',
        'pptx' => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.presentationml.presentation',
        'txt' => 'text/plain',
        'rtf' => 'application/rtf',
        'zip' => 'application/zip',
    );

    $max_file_size = 5 * 1024 * 1024; // 5 MB

    if (!in_array($file_type['type'], $allowed_types) && !in_array($file_type['ext'], array_keys($allowed_types))) {
        wp_send_json_error('Sorry, this file type is not allowed. Allowed types: ' . implode(', ', array_keys($allowed_types)));
    }

    if ($file_size > $max_file_size) {
        wp_send_json_error('File size exceeds the maximum allowed (' . size_format($max_file_size) . ').');
    }

    // Generate a unique filename to prevent overwrites and security issues
    $new_file_name = wp_unique_filename($ufu_user_dir, $file_name);
    $destination = $ufu_user_dir . '/' . $new_file_name;

    if (move_uploaded_file($file_tmp_name, $destination)) {
        // Save file information to user meta
        $file_data = array(
            'filename'      => $new_file_name,
            'original_name' => $file_name,
            'filepath'      => str_replace($upload_dir_info['basedir'], $upload_dir_info['baseurl'], $destination), // URL to the file
            'filetype'      => $file_type['type'],
            'filesize'      => $file_size,
            'uploaded_on'   => current_time('mysql'),
            'uploader_id'   => $user_id,
            'document_type' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['ufu_file_type']),
            'description'   => sanitize_text_field($_POST['ufu_file_description'])
        );

        // Get existing files for this user
        $user_files = get_user_meta($user_id, 'ufu_uploaded_files', true);
        if (!is_array($user_files)) {
            $user_files = array();
        }

        $user_files[] = $file_data;
        update_user_meta($user_id, 'ufu_uploaded_files', $user_files);

        wp_send_json_success(array(
            'message' => 'File uploaded successfully!',
            'files_list' => ufu_display_user_files($user_id) // Refresh the list
        ));
    } else {
        wp_send_json_error('Error moving the uploaded file.');
    }
}
add_action('wp_ajax_ufu_upload_file_action', 'ufu_handle_file_upload'); // For logged-in users
add_action('wp_ajax_nopriv_ufu_upload_file_action', 'ufu_handle_file_upload'); // If you want to allow non-logged-in users (not recommended for this plugin)

/**
 * Display a list of files uploaded by the current user.
 *
 * @param int $user_id The ID of the user whose files to display.
 * @return string HTML list of files.
 */
function ufu_display_user_files($user_id) {
    $user_files = get_user_meta($user_id, 'ufu_uploaded_files', true);
    $output = '';

    if (!empty($user_files) && is_array($user_files)) {
        $output .= '<ul>';
        foreach ($user_files as $key => $file) {
            $output .= '<li>';
            $output .= '<strong>File Name:</strong> ' . esc_html($file['original_name']) . '<br>';
            $output .= '<strong>Type:</strong> ' . esc_html(ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $file['document_type']))) . '<br>';
            if (!empty($file['description'])) {
                $output .= '<strong>Description:</strong> ' . esc_html($file['description']) . '<br>';
            }
            $output .= '<strong>Size:</strong> ' . size_format($file['filesize']) . '<br>';
            $output .= '<strong>Uploaded:</strong> ' . esc_html(date_i18n(get_option('date_format') . ' ' . get_option('time_format'), strtotime($file['uploaded_on']))) . '<br>';
            $output .= '<a href="' . esc_url($file['filepath']) . '" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">View File</a> | ';
            $output .= '<a href="#" class="ufu-delete-file" data-file-key="' . esc_attr($key) . '" data-user-id="' . esc_attr($user_id) . '">Delete File</a>';
            $output .= '</li>';
        }
        $output .= '</ul>';
    } else {
        $output = '<p>No files uploaded yet.</p>';
    }
    return $output;
}

/**
 * Handle file deletion via AJAX.
 */
function ufu_handle_file_deletion() {
    if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
        wp_send_json_error('You must be logged in to delete files.');
    }

    if (!isset($_POST['security']) || !wp_verify_nonce($_POST['security'], 'ufu_upload_file_nonce')) {
        wp_send_json_error('Security check failed.');
    }

    $user_id = get_current_user_id();
    $file_key = isset($_POST['file_key']) ? intval($_POST['file_key']) : -1;

    if ($file_key < 0) {
        wp_send_json_error('Invalid file key.');
    }

    $user_files = get_user_meta($user_id, 'ufu_uploaded_files', true);
    if (!is_array($user_files) || !isset($user_files[$file_key])) {
        wp_send_json_error('File not found.');
    }

    $file_to_delete = $user_files[$file_key];

    // Attempt to delete the physical file
    $upload_dir_info = wp_upload_dir();
    $relative_path = str_replace($upload_dir_info['baseurl'], '', $file_to_delete['filepath']);
    $physical_path = $upload_dir_info['basedir'] . $relative_path;

    if (file_exists($physical_path) && unlink($physical_path)) {
        // Remove from user meta
        unset($user_files[$file_key]);
        // Re-index the array
        $user_files = array_values($user_files);
        update_user_meta($user_id, 'ufu_uploaded_files', $user_files);

        wp_send_json_success(array(
            'message' => 'File deleted successfully!',
            'files_list' => ufu_display_user_files($user_id) // Refresh the list
        ));
    } else {
        wp_send_json_error('Error deleting the physical file or file not found on server.');
    }
}
add_action('wp_ajax_ufu_delete_file_action', 'ufu_handle_file_deletion');

/**
 * Add a settings link to the plugin on the plugins page.
 */
function ufu_add_settings_link($links) {
    $settings_link = '<a href="' . admin_url('options-general.php?page=ufu-settings') . '">Settings</a>';
    array_unshift($links, $settings_link);
    return $links;
}
add_filter('plugin_action_links_' . UFU_PLUGIN_BASENAME, 'ufu_add_settings_link');

/**
 * Add admin menu page for plugin settings (optional, but good practice).
 */
function ufu_add_admin_menu() {
    add_options_page(
        'User File Uploader Settings',
        'User File Uploader',
        'manage_options',
        'ufu-settings',
        'ufu_settings_page_content'
    );
}
add_action('admin_menu', 'ufu_add_admin_menu');

/**
 * Render the settings page content.
 */
function ufu_settings_page_content() {
    ?>
    <div class="wrap">
        <h1>User File Uploader Settings</h1>
        <p>This plugin allows users to upload profile pictures and documents. Use the shortcode <code>[user_file_uploader]</code> on any page or post.</p>
        <p>Files are stored in <code><?php echo esc_html(wp_upload_dir()['basedir'] . '/' . UFU_UPLOAD_DIR_NAME); ?></code>, with user-specific subdirectories.</p>
        <p>Currently, there are no configurable options. This page serves as an informational hub.</p>
    </div>
    <?php
}

// Inline JS for handling AJAX form submission and deletion (for simplicity, typically in a separate JS file)
function ufu_inline_js_and_css() {
    if (is_user_logged_in() && !is_admin() && has_shortcode(get_the_content(), 'user_file_uploader')) {
        ?>
        <style type="text/css">
            #ufu-upload-form-wrapper {
                max-width: 600px;
                margin: 20px auto;
                padding: 20px;
                border: 1px solid #ddd;
                border-radius: 5px;
                background-color: #f9f9f9;
            }
            #ufu-upload-form p {
                margin-bottom: 10px;
            }
            #ufu-upload-form label {
                display: block;
                margin-bottom: 5px;
                font-weight: bold;
            }
            #ufu-upload-form input[type="text"],
            #ufu-upload-form select,
            #ufu-upload-form input[type="file"] {
                width: 100%;
                padding: 8px;
                border: 1px solid #ccc;
                border-radius: 4px;
                box-sizing: border-box;
            }
            #ufu-upload-form input[type="submit"] {
                background-color: #0073aa;
                color: white;
                padding: 10px 15px;
                border: none;
                border-radius: 4px;
                cursor: pointer;
                font-size: 16px;
            }
            #ufu-upload-form input[type="submit"]:hover {
                background-color: #005177;
            }
            #ufu-upload-message {
                margin-top: 15px;
                padding: 10px;
                border-radius: 4px;
                display: none; /* Hidden by default */
            }
            #ufu-upload-message.success {
                background-color: #d4edda;
                color: #155724;
                border-color: #c3e6cb;
            }
            #ufu-upload-message.error {
                background-color: #f8d7da;
                color: #721c24;
                border-color: #f5c6cb;
            }
            #ufu-user-files-list ul {
                list-style: none;
                padding: 0;
            }
            #ufu-user-files-list li {
                border: 1px solid #eee;
                padding: 10px;
                margin-bottom: 10px;
                background-color: #fff;
                border-radius: 4px;
            }
            #ufu-user-files-list li a {
                margin-right: 10px;
            }
            .ufu-delete-file {
                color: #dc3232;
                text-decoration: none;
            }
            .ufu-delete-file:hover {
                text-decoration: underline;
            }
        </style>
        <script type="text/javascript">
            jQuery(document).ready(function($) {
                // Handle file upload form submission
                $('#ufu-upload-form').on('submit', function(e) {
                    e.preventDefault();

                    var formData = new FormData(this);
                    formData.append('action', 'ufu_upload_file_action');
                    formData.append('security', ufu_ajax_object.security);

                    var uploadMessage = $('#ufu-upload-message');
                    uploadMessage.hide().removeClass('success error').text('');
                    $('input[type="submit"]', this).prop('disabled', true).val('Uploading...');

                    $.ajax({
                        url: ufu_ajax_object.ajax_url,
                        type: 'POST',
                        data: formData,
                        processData: false,
                        contentType: false,
                        success: function(response) {
                            if (response.success) {
                                uploadMessage.addClass('success').text(response.data.message).show();
                                $('#ufu-user-files-list').html(response.data.files_list);
                                $('#ufu-upload-form')[0].reset(); // Clear the form
                            } else {
                                uploadMessage.addClass('error').text(response.data).show();
                            }
                        },
                        error: function(jqXHR, textStatus, errorThrown) {
                            uploadMessage.addClass('error').text('An unknown error occurred: ' + textStatus).show();
                            console.error('AJAX Error:', textStatus, errorThrown, jqXHR);
                        },
                        complete: function() {
                            $('input[type="submit"]', '#ufu-upload-form').prop('disabled', false).val('Upload File');
                        }
                    });
                });

                // Handle file deletion
                $(document).on('click', '.ufu-delete-file', function(e) {
                    e.preventDefault();

                    if (!confirm('Are you sure you want to delete this file? This action cannot be undone.')) {
                        return;
                    }

                    var $button = $(this);
                    var fileKey = $button.data('file-key');
                    var userId = $button.data('user-id');
                    var uploadMessage = $('#ufu-upload-message');
                    uploadMessage.hide().removeClass('success error').text('');

                    $button.text('Deleting...');
                    $button.prop('disabled', true);

                    $.ajax({
                        url: ufu_ajax_object.ajax_url,
                        type: 'POST',
                        data: {
                            action: 'ufu_delete_file_action',
                            security: ufu_ajax_object.security,
                            file_key: fileKey,
                            user_id: userId
                        },
                        success: function(response) {
                            if (response.success) {
                                uploadMessage.addClass('success').text(response.data.message).show();
                                $('#ufu-user-files-list').html(response.data.files_list);
                            } else {
                                uploadMessage.addClass('error').text(response.data).show();
                            }
                        },
                        error: function(jqXHR, textStatus, errorThrown) {
                            uploadMessage.addClass('error').text('An unknown error occurred during deletion: ' + textStatus).show();
                            console.error('AJAX Error:', textStatus, errorThrown, jqXHR);
                        },
                        complete: function() {
                             $button.text('Delete File');
                             $button.prop('disabled', false);
                        }
                    });
                });
            });
        </script>
        <?php
    }
}
add_action('wp_footer', 'ufu_inline_js_and_css');

// Cleanup on plugin deactivation
function ufu_deactivation_hook() {
    // Optionally remove the user_meta data for uploaded files
    // This could be heavy if many users have many files, so usually commented out
    // global $wpdb;
    // $wpdb->delete($wpdb->usermeta, array('meta_key' => 'ufu_uploaded_files'));

    // Optionally remove the created directory. This is usually not done on deactivation
    // as it could lead to data loss if user accidentally deactivates.
    // Consider adding an option in settings to do this.
    // $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
    // $ufu_dir = $upload_dir['basedir'] . '/' . UFU_UPLOAD_DIR_NAME;
    // if (file_exists($ufu_dir)) {
    //     // Delete directory and contents - be very careful with this!
    //     // function ufu_rrmdir($dir) {
    //     //     if (is_dir($dir)) {
    //     //         $objects = scandir($dir);
    //     //         foreach ($objects as $object) {
    //     //             if ($object != "." && $object != "..") {
    //     //                 if (filetype($dir."/".$object) == "dir") ufu_rrmdir($dir."/".$object); else unlink($dir."/".$object);
    //     //             }
    //     //         }
    //     //         rmdir($dir);
    //     //     }
    //     // }
    //     // ufu_rrmdir($ufu_dir);
    // }
}
register_deactivation_hook(__FILE__, 'ufu_deactivation_hook');

// Cleanup on plugin uninstallation (careful with this, it's destructive)
function ufu_uninstall_hook() {
    // Delete all user meta related to this plugin
    global $wpdb;
    $wpdb->delete($wpdb->usermeta, array('meta_key' => 'ufu_uploaded_files'));

    // Delete the custom upload directory and all its contents
    $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
    $ufu_dir = $upload_dir['basedir'] . '/' . UFU_UPLOAD_DIR_NAME;

    if (file_exists($ufu_dir)) {
        // Recursive delete function for directory and contents
        function ufu_rrmdir($dir) {
            if (is_dir($dir)) {
                $objects = scandir($dir);
                foreach ($objects as $object) {
                    if ($object != "." && $object != "..") {
                        if (is_dir($dir."/".$object))
                            ufu_rrmdir($dir."/".$object);
                        else
                            unlink($dir."/".$object);
                    }
                }
                rmdir($dir);
            }
        }
        ufu_rrmdir($ufu_dir);
    }
}
register_uninstall_hook(__FILE__, 'ufu_uninstall_hook');
?>
